history.text: The May Revolution reshaped Argentina's political life.
Argentina declared independence or statehood, marking a decisive political break.
A constitution set out Argentina's basic framework of government.

worthSeeing.title: Buenos Aires:
worthSeeing.text: Vibrant capital with European flair, tango, steakhouses, and grand boulevards.

worthSeeing.title: Patagonia:
worthSeeing.text: Wind-swept wilderness of glaciers, mountains, and guanacos at the end of the world.

worthSeeing.title: Iguazu Falls:
worthSeeing.text: One of the world's great waterfalls, shared with Brazil, surrounded by rainforest.
